productDisplayName: Buckaroo Men Nieves Brown Formal Shoe
description: buckaroo is known for its exquisite craft in leather. These formal shoes are the most fashionable way to walk into your office. This Buckaroo men Nieves Black Casual shoe is a tactile pair that is a fashion forward and yet a comfortable foot-style choice. Pair it with crisp formal trousers, full sleeve shirts and tonal belts. Upper Genuine leather upper for durability and style Pointed toe design for style Leather wrap-around overlay along the heel and midfoot for better support Concealed elastic gores on either side for a customised Fit Slip-on design for easy removal and wearing of shoes Lightly padded collar and tongue for in-step comfort and a snug fit Well-cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Brand badge on the midfoot Leather lining to absorb moisture and keep feet dry Midsole EVA midsole with shock absorbers Outsole Durable rubber outsole with textured patterns on the forefoot and heel for enhanced grip and traction Raised heel for ergonomic comfort and style Shoe care Wipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner Do not store in direct sunlight
